allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed PID $_" } catch {} }; Get-Process -Name "ngrok" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force; "killed ngrok PID $\($_.Id\)" }; "---done---")
